name: Cobbler - Joan Elian
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a baking dish with butter.
2. Put the fruit in the prepared baking dish.
3. In a bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, salt, milk, and sugar until combined.
4. Pour the batter mixture over the fruit.
5. Melt the butter and pour it evenly over the top of the cobbler filling.
6. Place the covered dish in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) and bake for 35 minutes.
(Alternative method)
1. In a separate bowl, mix together 3/4 cup milk and flour to make a batter.
2. Melt the butter and pour it into the baking dish.
3. Place the melted butter in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C).
4. Pour the remaining batter over the melted butter.
5. Add the fruit on top without stirring.
6. Bake for 1 hour.
